title: QCentroid makes NVIDIA CUDA-Q available in its QuantumOps Platform to accelerate enterprise hybrid quantum adoption - QCentroid
why:
- QCentroid has integrated NVIDIA CUDA-Q into its QuantumOps Platform, enabling GPU-accelerated quantum workflow development, benchmarking, and experiment lifecycle management within a unified framework.
- The integration allows enterprise teams to develop and evaluate hybrid quantum-classical workflows using NVIDIA accelerated computing alongside quantum backends.
- This setup streamlines hybrid execution pipelines, enabling faster iteration cycles and reducing barriers to running quantum and hybrid experiments.
- QCentroid’s QuantumOps Platform supports workflow orchestration, benchmark design and execution, comparative analysis, traceability, and reporting for enterprise quantum computing efforts.
- An AI Copilot layer is included to help enterprises quickly define use cases, formulate models, choose solvers and backends, and generate starter code, accelerating resource-intensive steps in the adoption lifecycle.
